All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractBase
An abstract base class that can be used to conveniently extends to get common functionality (for example a logger).
AbstractStringifiable
Default abstract base class of stringifiables.
ArrayUtil
Array utility class.
ClassUtil
Utility class for class functionality.
CommonsIOException
Unchecked exception wrapper for IO-related failures.
FileException
Raised if any problems arise dealing with a file.
FileUtil
A file utility class supporting both legacy java.io.File and modern java.nio.file.Path APIs.
IOUtils
IO utility class.
LoggerUtil
A logger utility class that adds the ability to log and return values as well as present a format arguments array to log vs creating an object array to log multiple things.
MethodUtil
Same vein as java.util.Collections
ObjectUtil
Utility class in the spirit of java.util.Objects.
PropertyUtil
Properties utility class.
SoapException
Exception thrown when SOAP operations fail.
SoapRecord<T>
Record type to hold a SOAP service and the port class type.
SoapUtil
Utility class for Apache CXF SOAP service operations.
Stringifiable
API to convert an object to a StringBuilder and makes it pretty.
StringUtil
Same vein as java.util.Objects
UrlException
Exception thrown when URL operations fail.
UrlUtil
Utility class for URL parsing, creation, and manipulation.
